CustomField.formula: TRIM( BLANKVALUE("$" & TEXT(NonDeductibleAmount__c), "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(NonDeductibleAmount__c)), " ", "") & BLANKVALUE(TEXT(MembershipLevel__c), "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(MembershipLevel__c))), " ", "") & BLANKVALUE(TEXT(EnrollmentType__c), "") )
CustomField.label: Membership Term
